title: OPEC+ Agrees to Extend Production Cuts
summary: OPEC+ members agreed to extend voluntary production cuts of 2.2 million barrels per day through the end of 2024 to support market stability.

title: Drone Strike Hits Tuapse Refinery
summary: A Ukrainian drone strike targeted the Rosneft refinery in Tuapse, causing a major fire and forcing a temporary shutdown of the facility.

title: OFAC Sanctions Tanker for Price Cap Violation
summary: The US Treasury sanctioned a Marshall Islands-registered tanker for transporting Russian crude oil priced above the $60 G7 price cap.

title: Panama Canal Transit Restrictions Tightened
summary: Severe drought led the Panama Canal Authority to further reduce daily vessel transits, impacting energy trade flows between the US Gulf Coast and Asia.
